---
title: "Research"
---

My research focuses on **robust statistics**, **semiparametric regression models**, **variable selection**, and **mathematical and statistical learning**. My work combines methodological developments with computational implementations in R, with applications to robust and nonparametric regression.

## Journal Articles

- **2024.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Robust variable selection for partially linear additive models*.  
  **Statistics and Computing**, 34, 201.  
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10520-7

- **2023.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *A robust spline approach in partially linear additive models*.  
  **Computational Statistics & Data Analysis**, 178, 107611.  
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.csda.2022.107611

- **2021.** Martínez, A. M. and Salibián-Barrera, M.  
  *RBF: An R package to compute a robust backfitting estimator for additive models*.  
  **Journal of Open Source Software**, 6(60), 2992.  
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.02992

- **2017.** Boente, G., Martínez, A. M. and Salibián-Barrera, M.  
  *Robust estimators for additive models using backfitting*.  
  **Journal of Nonparametric Statistics**, 29, 744–767.

- **2017.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Marginal integration M-estimators for additive models*.  
  **TEST**, 26, 231–260.

- **2016.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Estimating additive models with missing responses*.  
  **Communications in Statistics: Theory and Methods**, 45, 413–429.

## Book Chapters

- **2025.** Martínez, A. M.  
  *Addressing Robustness and Sparsity in Partially Linear Additive Models*.  
  In **New Trends in Functional Statistics and Related Fields**. Springer. Proceedings of the International Workshop on Functional and Operatorial Statistics (IWFOS). Chapter 44, pp. 365–374.  
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-92383-8

## Conference Proceedings

- **2025.** Duna, C. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Estudio de los errores en la resolución de inecuaciones en alumnos ingresantes al Profesorado de Matemática*.  
  In *Actas de las VIII Jornadas de Educación Matemática y V Jornadas de Investigación en Educación Matemática*. Universidad Nacional del Litoral.

- **2018.** Martínez, A. M. and Murrone, N.  
  *Comparación de propuestas para el análisis de componentes principales en matrices con datos faltantes*.  
  In *Anales de LatinR 2018*. 47 JAIIO.

- **2014.** Boente, G., Martínez, A. M. and Salibián-Barrera, M.  
  *Robust estimators in additive models with missing responses*.  
  In *II ISNPS Book of Abstracts*. Universidad Carlos III de Madrid and the International Society for Nonparametric Statistics.

## Preprints

- **2025.** Martínez, A. M.  
  *A robust estimation and variable selection approach for sparse partially linear additive models*.  
  arXiv: http://arxiv.org/abs/2502.13126

- **2024.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Robust variable selection for partially linear additive models*.  
  arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.10869

- **2021.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *A robust spline approach in partially linear additive models*.  
  arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.12987

- **2015.** Boente, G. and Martínez, A. M.  
  *Marginal integration M-estimators for additive models*.  
  arXiv: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1509.04334
